description: Heuristics for detecting typosquats. The CLI computes Levenshtein distance against the top-1000 list per ecosystem.

rules.description: Reject candidate packages within Levenshtein distance 2 of a top-1000 package
Detect Unicode-confusable homoglyph substitutions (rеact with Cyrillic 'е' instead of Latin 'e')
Detect packages mimicking another with -js, -lib, -core, -utils suffix appended
